{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323155430BD9AC60F6D69A9341726"}"},"total":35},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403045953140048702","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看 节奏紧凑 作者大大千万不要坑啊[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723661135,"group_id":"7390252247617129534","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看小说单纯为了娱乐自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2jb92n5dfxenUvJOkRHve+e7p2ZBDWK6rfkvYYY6vR5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aadaf7a6dbbb4cc9b495d983c055bf92~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789924&x-signature=R3A95ulToLcZPeaUWfxi0wewMY8%3D","user_id":"2265466312328643","user_name":"举足轻重的鹿角"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2265466312328643","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390252247617129534","book_info":{"abstract":"时安安穿越了！
　　她穿成了天启王朝五品工部郎中的庶女，虽然不受宠，但是家里有钱，她当即打算躺平当一个老实的咸鱼庶女。
　　可一个自称自己是二百五的游戏基建系统突然绑定了她，告诉她这个世界即将变成末世世界！
　　WTF？她不能躺平了？
　　【恭喜宿主获得建造区防护罩＊1】
　　……
　　时安安来之前，光明村的村民们以为自己一辈子都只能麻木的挣扎求生，可她为他们带了红薯、土豆、棉花……
　　人人都能住得起砖瓦房……
　　人人都能上学……
　　在其他人还在末世挣扎求生时，他们已经成了所有人眼中的光明！
　　（PS:古代末世基建爽文，感情线少，主要多了不会写，金手指粗大）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5271dfd78bef6d98138a7331740fb9d4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小迷胡","author_id":"","book_id":"7390252247617129534","book_name":"开局天灾：我带系统建设安全区","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7392996407633789502","read_count":"260","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"535281"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"236","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,穿越,末世,今穿古,基建,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/21e27fba6c36373eebce707febdf1831~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436470&x-signature=nmPKne1ztpdFkx3eXIrxOubnHwU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110917131689","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novel
